sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1982. !bort title
(1) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, .Appropria­
sections.text:
there may be expended from the general revenues of the tion
public such moneys, not exceeding in the aggregate, one
thousand and seventy-six million, thirty-seven thousand, four
hundred and sixty-three kwacha, as may be required for the
servicee of the Republic during the financial year ending on the
31st December, 1982.
(2) The moneys mentioned in subsection (1) shall be appro­
priated to the services of the Republic mentioned in the second
column of the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts
indicated in the third colwnn thereof.
(3) On the written authority of the Permanent Secretary,
Ministry of Finance, tho amounts shown under the sub-heads of
the estimates may be varied:
Provided-
(i) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not
thereby be altered; and
(ii) any of the amounts shown under Head 320 or 321 shall
not be varied.
